title: Ladies Must Dress
writer: Malcolm Stuart Boylan, Victor Heerman, Reggie Morris
actors: Virginia Valli, Lawrence Gray, Hallam Cooley
plot: "Eve and Joe are engaged, but Joe cannot help contrasting the drabness of her attire with the dressy clothes of their friends. She overhears him talking of this and breaks with him. Then, with the help of her friend, Mazie, she me...
